description: Changpeng Zhao (CZ), co-founder and former CEO of Binance, discusses various topics related to Binance Chain, validator nodes, and the business model during a Twitter AMA. He emphasizes the importance of launching the Binance Dex quickly and addresses questions from the community.
topic_summary: In this AMA, CZ answers questions about Binance Chain's validator nodes, performance requirements, and the choice of Cosmos architecture. He highlights the simplicity of the initial business model and the goal of getting the Binance Dex operational as soon as possible. [t=1:68] [t=180:39]
